# Build Engine app (scaffold)

This project was scaffolded by the Build Engine. The Executor will fill in features.

## Stack

- Next.js 16 + TypeScript (strict)
- Vitest for unit tests
- ESLint via `next lint`

The full v1 stack (Drizzle, Better Auth, Tailwind) is layered in by the Executor as plan tasks rather than baked into this minimal scaffold.

## Run locally

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev          # http://localhost:3000
pnpm test:run     # vitest
pnpm lint
pnpm exec tsc --noEmit
```

## Generated by the Build Engine

- Spec: `../spec.md`
- Plan: `../plan.md`
- DB schema reference (locked by Plan Engine): `db_schema.reference.json`
